name: Expion360 Inc.
business: Expion360 designs, assembles, manufactures, and sells lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) batteries and supporting accessories for recreational vehicles (RVs), marine, and industrial applications. Its customers include dealers, wholesalers, private-label customers, and original equipment manufacturers (OEMs). The company also sells accessories such as chargers, monitors, inverters, and solar components.

exposures.sentence: Expion360 focuses on the design, assembly, manufacturing, and sale of lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) batteries and supporting accessories for recreational vehicles (RVs), marine, and industrial applications.
Our 48 Volt GC2 LiFePO4 battery was the first model to incorporate e360 SmartTalk for electric golf carts and other light electric vehicle applications.
We are also pursuing opportunities within the electric forklift and industrial material handling markets, where lithium battery adoption continues to increase.

Artificial intelligence (AI) and data-driven analytics are increasingly being incorporated into energy management, predictive maintenance, and supply chain optimization across the battery industry. While AI is not currently a primary driver of our product offerings, we monitor developments in this area and assess potential applications that may enhance system diagnostics, performance monitoring, and operational efficiency over time.

catalysts.event: Commercial launch of three next-generation lithium-ion battery models (Group 27, GC2H, EX1)
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced plans to release three next-generation lithium-ion battery models expected to be commercially available in the second half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global RV market valued at $60.7B in 2022, projected to reach $144.55B by 2031
tamClaims.sentence: The global RV market was valued at approximately $60.7 billion in 2022 and is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.5% from 2023 through 2030, reaching an estimated $144.55 billion by 2031, according to Grand View Research.

tamClaims.claim: Global lithium-ion battery market exceeded $150B in 2025 and continues to expand
tamClaims.sentence: According to IMARC, the global lithium-ion battery market exceeded $150 billion in 2025 and continues to expand as electrification advances across transportation, industrial, and specialty equipment sectors.

tamClaims.claim: Global light electric vehicle market estimated at $107B in 2025, projected to reach $268B by 2035
tamClaims.sentence: According to Precedence Research, the global light electric vehicle market was estimated at $107 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $268 billion by 2035.
